headline: PulteGroup Ekes Out an Earnings Beat, and Juices the Stock
summary: PulteGroup  barely topped earnings expectations on Wednesday, but did enough to convince Wall Street that the home construction business is turning the corner.  Pulte posted second-quarter earnings of $2.48 a share, way off the $3.03 a year ago.  Wall Street’s projection was $2.36.
